$comment: Hand-curated overrides merged onto model-catalog.json at load time via RFC 7396 JSON Merge Patch. Ships empty. Add local additions here (e.g. a model row, an alias, or a tweaked relationship) — they survive any future automated refresh of the base file, which never touches this overlay. See scripts/validate-model-catalog.ps1 and .github/workflows/model-catalog-refresh.yml.
